scenes.title: Seastone Harbor bargain
scenes.biggestGap: Harbor negotiation occasionally lifts into essay language instead of staying in mud, coin, tack, and relay procedure.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Switchback, quay, stable path, and the last Farstrider signal cairn keep departure tied to Seastone's cliffside infrastructure.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Mud, purse strap, warm mare, wet planks, and the relay cylinder must stay in hand.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads severance through cost, cold, and the dead sending-stone rather than abstract resolve.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Dagny's bargaining beats must stay grounded in purse weight, horse handling, and gangplank timing.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Boarding has to end on ship motion and shore geometry falling away.

scenes.title: Harbor departure
scenes.biggestGap: Several transition beats name the emotional transformation instead of letting gangplank, rope, canvas, and coastline do it.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Departure stays bound to berth, breakwater, and visible cliff path.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Gangplank thud, rail salt, rope, and deck flex carry the threshold.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina feels sea travel through knees, gloves, ribs, and the clearer northward pull.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Short shipboard lines need nearby rope, skin, or deck motion.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Open-water loss of shore has to stay physical, not lyrical.

scenes.title: The crossing and correction
scenes.biggestGap: Strong shipboard labor sometimes gets undercut by thesis sentences and analogies when the headwind and Jaina's cost should stay bodily.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The schooner's working lanes, scuppers, lee rail, and stern ladder must keep every exchange shipbound.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Wet gloves, rope burn, mug heat, oilskin, and frost on canvas hold the scene down.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads magical opposition through teeth, eyes, balance, nausea, and timing with Dagny's seamanship.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Dagny and Sylvanas exchanges need deck labor and posture beats, not abstract interpretation.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The stop-and-obey beat must stay tied to ladder rung, counted breaths, and resumed work.

scenes.title: Northrend approach and landfall
scenes.biggestGap: The final third needs harder arrival specifics so Northrend, Daggercap Bay, and Arthas's lead read through ice, dockwork, and burned hulls instead of atmosphere alone.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Arrival must stay in the ice-choked bay, hooked stone point, and dock heads.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Rigging frost, iron-tipped poles, charred hull ribs, crates, and frozen mud hold the final third down.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads Northrend through metallic light, inland drag, and the dock staying still under exhausted legs.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Approach callouts should stay attached to soundings, poles, and shoreline reads.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Landfall must end on dock, air, and inland track pressure rather than abstract destiny.
